content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

Which of the following is the correct active voice of: "The house was being built by them"?

a) They were building the house.

b) They build the house.

c) They will build the house.

d) They had built the house.

Solution: a) They were building the house.Explanation: </sp

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

an>

The passive sentence is in the past continuous tense ("was being built"), so the active form must also be in the past continuous tense: "were building."Also Check:➣ Test your knowledge- Quiz!
